title: Setting Up Your Forensic Environment
content:
{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"imageBlock","attrs":{"src":"/assets/018e4ce2-43f0-4f06-b653-e16be4ec0853","alt":"Understanding the Firefly Algorithm","caption":"","type":"local"}},{"type":"paragraph"},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Listen up. Setting up a digital forensic environment isn't some weekend homelab project. If you contaminate the evidence because your workstation wasn't secure, isolated workstation. Read the instructions, follow them to the letter, and do not take shortcuts.opjjjjpop.jopjpjojpjp"}]},{"type":"tableBlock","attrs":{"scrollable":false,"scrollHeight":400,"pagination":false,"rowsPerPage":10,"rowsPerPageOptions":[5,10,25,50],"columns":[{"id":"col1","label":"Column 1","sortable":false,"filterable":false},{"id":"col2","label":"Column 2","sortable":false,"filterable":false},{"id":"col3","label":"Cjjk 3","sortable":false,"filterable":false}],"rows":[{"id":"row1","col1":"Data 1-1","col2":"Dat2","col3":"D1-3"},{"id":"row2","col1":"Data 2-1","col2":"Data 2-2","col3":"Data 2-3"},{"id":"row3","col1":"Data 3-1","col2":"D-2","col3":"Data 3-3"}]}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":1},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"gjhgjhghjgj"}]},{"type":"infoBlock","attrs":{"id":"info-1776967986488-lgocl0did","type":"danger"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Zero Tolerance for Contamination"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"If you think you can just plug a suspect drive into your daily-driver laptop, stop reading and find another career. Cross-contamination destroys evidence integrity permanently."}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"The Core Architecture"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Your forensic environment must be physically and logically separated from everything else. You do not browse the web on this machine. You do not check your email on this machine."}]},{"type":"mermaidBlock","attrs":{"id":"mermaid-1776967986488-7stely28p","diagram":"flowchart TD
    A["Untrusted Evidence Drive"] -->|Hardware Write-Blocker| B["Isolated Forensic Workstation"]
    B --> C["Primary Storage Array"]
    B --> D["Secondary Archive (Off-site)"]
    
    style A fill:#ffcccc,stroke:#cc0000,stroke-width:2px
    style B fill:#e6f3ff,stroke:#0066cc,stroke-width:2px
    style C fill:#ccffcc,stroke:#009900,stroke-width:2px
    style D fill:#ccffcc,stroke:#009900,stroke-width:2px","title":""}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Mandatory Setup Procedures"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Do not skip a single step here. Your workstation is the only thing standing between a successful investigation and a compromised chain of custody."}]},{"type":"stepsBlock","attrs":{"id":"steps-1776967986488-k0rn5jkil"},"content":[{"type":"stepBlock","attrs":{"title":"Air-Gap the Workstation"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Disconnect the forensic machine from the corporate network and the internet. If you absolutely require network access for cloud forensics, use a strictly controlled, dedicated VLAN with default-deny firewall rules."}]}]},{"type":"stepBlock","attrs":{"title":"Deploy Hardware Write-Blockers"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Never interface with original evidence directly. Use validated hardware write-blockers. If you mount a suspect drive with read/write access, you have altered the evidence and failed your objective."}]}]},{"type":"stepBlock","attrs":{"title":"Configure Storage Redundancy"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"A single point of failure is unacceptable. All forensic images must be archived in more than one physical location and on more than one storage device to ensure a single-system failure never results in data loss "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://www.nist.gov/document/osac-2024-n-0011-standard-guide-forensic-digital-image-management-version-10","target":"_self","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","class":"custom-link","title":null}}],"text":"OSAC 2024-N-0011"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]}]},{"type":"stepBlock","attrs":{"title":"Install Professional Tooling"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Install industry-standard forensic suites. Keep them updated via offline installers. Do not rely on unvetted, open-source scripts downloaded from random repositories for critical evidence extraction."}]}]}]},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Image Management Rules"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Handling digital images requires strict adherence to protocol. The OSAC 2024-N-0011 standard isn't a suggestion; it's the baseline for not getting laughed out of a courtroom or audit."}]},{"type":"tableBlock","attrs":{"scrollable":false,"scrollHeight":400,"pagination":false,"rowsPerPage":10,"rowsPerPageOptions":[5,10,25,50],"columns":[{"id":"col1","label":"Rule","sortable":false,"filterable":false},{"id":"col2","label":"Enforcement","sortable":false,"filterable":false}],"rows":[{"id":"row1","col1":"Native Formats","col2":"Original images must be maintained in their native file format and protected at all times"},{"id":"row2","col1":"OSAC 2024-N-0011","col2":""},{"id":"row3","col1":". Do not convert or compress them.","col2":""},{"id":"row4","col1":"Retrieval","col2":"Store original images, processed images, and documentation so they can be instantly retrieved and associated with case files. Disorganization is incompetence."},{"id":"row5","col1":"Integrity Checks","col2":"Generate cryptographic hashes (SHA-256) immediately upon acquisition. Verify them constantly."}]}},{"type":"heading","attrs":{"level":2},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"Cloud Forensics Reality Check"}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"If you are investigating cloud environments, the attack surface has expanded, and the threats are significantly more sophisticated. Misconfigurations, compromised credentials, and supply chain vulnerabilities are rampant "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://www.qodequay.com/cloud-forensics-guide?srsltid=AfmBOooJE4AP7I-Lkx1HHnSSSx22CTWLFSSIQOBBumUOQ9qa0VvBkAo-","target":"_self","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","class":"custom-link","title":null}}],"text":"QodeQuay"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]},{"type":"infoBlock","attrs":{"id":"info-1776967986488-j5bmu8v0d","type":"warning"},"content":[{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"bold"}],"text":"Cloud Environments Require Specialized Capabilities"},{"type":"hardBreak"},{"type":"text","text":"Without specialized forensic capabilities for cloud infrastructure, you are ill-equipped to respond to modern threats. If you try to apply legacy, on-premise forensic techniques to an AWS or Azure breach, you will miss the artifacts, prolong the breach, and cause severe financial and reputational damage "},{"type":"text","marks":[{"type":"link","attrs":{"href":"https://www.qodequay.com/cloud-forensics-guide?srsltid=AfmBOooJE4AP7I-Lkx1HHnSSSx22CTWLFSSIQOBBumUOQ9qa0VvBkAo-","target":"_self","rel":"noopener noreferrer nofollow","class":"custom-link","title":null}}],"text":"QodeQuay"},{"type":"text","text":"."}]}]},{"type":"paragraph","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Get your environment built correctly, lock it down, and do the job right the first time. There are no do-overs in digital forensics."}]}]}
